name: googledrive_get_file_content
description: Get the content of a file from Google Drive. This works for text files, Google Docs, and other readable file types. For Google Docs, this retrieves the document content in plain text format.

fileId.description: The ID of the file to retrieve content from

alt.description: Specifies the format of the response. Use 'media' to get file content, 'json' for metadata only

fields.description: Fields to include in the response (only used when alt=json)

response_transformer.description: Transform Google Drive file content API response to standardized format
